1→--- 2→title: Learn Command Conditional Pipeline 3→last_audited: "2026-02-17 16:00 PT" 4→audit_result: clean 5→read_when: 6→ - "modifying the erk learn command flow" 7→ - "adding session discovery logic to learn workflow" 8→ - "understanding how preprocessed materials bypass session discovery" 9→tripwires: 10→ - action: "adding session discovery code before checking for preprocessed materials" 11→ warning: "Check gist URL first to avoid misleading output. The learn command checks _get_learn_materials_gist_url() BEFORE session discovery. If a gist exists, all session discovery is skipped." 12→--- 13→ 14→# Learn Command Conditional Pipeline 15→ 16→The `erk learn` command checks for preprocessed materials **before** session discovery, avoiding expensive and misleading session lookup when materials already exist. 17→ 18→## Pattern: Check Preprocessed Before Discovery 19→ 20→<!-- Source: src/erk/cli/commands/learn/learn_cmd.py, learn_cmd --> 21→ 22→The `learn_cmd()` function in `src/erk/cli/commands/learn/learn_cmd.py` checks for a gist URL before session discovery: 23→ 24→1. `_get_learn_materials_gist_url()` → checks plan header for gist_url 25→2. If gist exists: 26→ - Display "Preprocessed learn materials available" message 27→ - Skip ALL session discovery 28→ - Launch with gist_url directly via `_confirm_and_launch()` 29→3. If no gist: 30→ - Existing flow: discover sessions, display, confirm, launch
... [41 lines omitted] ...

| File | Fix | |------|-----| | `planned-pr-context-local-preprocessing.md` | Updated H1 heading from "Async Learn" to "Planned PR Context" | | `learn-without-pr-context.md` | Replaced "skips straight to gist upload" with "skips PR comment fetching" | | `learn-pipeline-workflow.md` | Updated `.erk/impl-context/` → `.erk/sessions/` in tripwire and stage 6 description | | `learn-command-conditional-pipeline.md` | Rewrote doc body: `_get_learn_materials_gist_url()` → `_get_learn_materials_branch()` with correct implementation details |
